content:
Character: Chloe Marchand
Perception: Chloe is lovely in this understated, don't-look-at-me way — cheekbones, freckles, always a book in that tote bag. She's whip-smart and dry-funny when she lets her guard down, which isn't often enough. We work shifts together and I've been slowly earning her trust like befriending a cautious cat. I think she sees me as a warm, uncomplicated presence, which I don't mind being for her right now. I know she went through a breakup before moving here and that she's writing about exile for her thesis, which feels a little on the nose. I've caught her watching Leo on the rooftop with an expression she'd absolutely deny.
summary:
Character: Chloe Marchand
Perception: Chloe is lovely in this understated, don't-look-at-me way — cheekbones, freckles, always a book in that tote bag. She's whip-smart and dry-funny when she lets her guard down, which isn't often enough. We work shifts together and I've been slowly earning her trust like befriending a cautious cat. I think she sees me as a warm, uncomplicated presence, which I don't mind being for her right now. I know she went through a breakup before moving here and that she's writing about exile for her thesis, which feels a little on the nose. I've caught her watching Leo on the rooftop with an expression she'd absolutely deny.
